stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
The annex shows an extract of the route info page on a typical operational flight produced by a flight planning tool.You are flying from GVAC to EGCC and notice there are three different distances shown on the flight plan. What is the significance of the difference between GND DIST and AIR DIST?

options.a: AIR DIST is the longest distance because it considers the altitude in addition to the route distance and shows the distance in three dimensions.
options.b: The difference between GND DIST and AIR DIST is a measure of the difference in radius of the great circle at MSL and at cruising altitude.
options.c: AIR DIST is the distance actually flown by the aeroplane taking into account the expected departure, cruise, and arrival routings.
options.d: GND DIST is the actual planned route distance but it is shorter because there is an average headwind component for the flight.
